title: Genie One enhancements
body:
* **Document citations**: Documents now show citations that link content back to the data and sources Genie One used to generate the document. See [View citations](/aws/en/genie-one/documents#citations).
* **Document version history**: Documents now keep a version history so you can review earlier versions. See [View version history](/aws/en/genie-one/documents#version-history).
* **Open document links in soft tabs**: Documents now support soft tabs, so you can open links without leaving the document. See [Open links in soft tabs](/aws/en/genie-one/documents#soft-tabs).
* **GitHub MCP (Beta)**: The GitHub MCP connection for Genie One is now in Beta. See [GitHub](/aws/en/genie-one/external-sources#github).
* **Genie One MCP App (Beta)**: The Genie One MCP App adds rich UI interactions from third-party agents, including interactive visualizations and Genie Ontology citations. See [Genie One MCP server](/aws/en/agents/mcp/genie-mcp).
* **Certified visualizations**: SQL charts and visualizations that Genie One inserts are now read-only and appear as certified visuals.
* **Scheduled tasks shared with you**: A new modal and listing page show the scheduled tasks that others have shared with you.
